overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a luxurious futuristic penthouse apartment in Cyberpunk 2077, moving from beside a parked white sports car toward floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking a sunny cityscape with palm trees and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury penthouse living space with interior vehicle parking

agents.ego_description: walking slowly past a white sports car parked inside the apartment, heading toward the large windows

notable_agents.action: white sports car parked stationary inside the luxury penthouse living area

entered.detail: transparent glass barrier separating the living area from the window wall
tall panoramic windows offering view of the futuristic cityscape
futuristic skyscrapers and high-rise buildings visible through the windows
tropical palm trees visible outside on the left side of the window view
highly polished white marble flooring reflecting ceiling lights and sunlight
small circular spotlights embedded in the dark ceiling providing ambient illumination

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a spacious, luxurious penthouse with polished marble floors and modern architecture. A white sports car is parked prominently on the left side of the frame as the camera walks forward. Floor-to-ceiling windows in the distance reveal a sunny futuristic cityscape with palm trees and towering skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching glass wall overlooking futuristic city

events.description: increasing natural sunlight dominance as camera approaches the large windows

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk toward the glass railing, getting closer to the window overlooking the city

entered.detail: red geometric holographic advertisement floating outside the window

segments.scene_description: The white sports car exits the frame to the left as the camera continues advancing toward the glass railing. The view opens up to reveal more detail of the futuristic city skyline, and a red holographic advertisement becomes visible floating outside the window. The lighting shifts to be dominated by bright natural sunlight streaming through the approaching windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a luxurious penthouse that transitions from an interior architectural space to an expansive view of a sun-drenched futuristic city. It begins on polished marble floors with a white sports car parked prominently to the left as the camera advances toward distant floor-to-ceiling windows. As the camera moves forward, the car exits the frame, allowing the interior space to open up toward a glass railing. The scene then shifts as bright natural sunlight begins to dominate the lighting, revealing a detailed skyline of towering skyscrapers and palm trees. Finally, the perspective expands to fully showcase the cityscape, where a red holographic advertisement floats vividly outside the glass.
